now.body: I'm building Cadence, a coach ↔ athlete mobile app I'm co-founding with Alexandre. We're in active development after 13 planned sprints and 169+ structured issues. Landing page live at cadence-web-fawn.vercel.app, source on GitHub. In parallel, I'm pursuing my B.Eng. in Software Engineering at ÉTS and looking for a Junior or Intermediate Full-Stack role in Greater Montréal.

about.title: About
about.heading: I build systems that hold up.
paragraphs: Full-stack developer based in Repentigny, Greater Montréal. Bilingual EN/FR, currently studying B.Eng. in Software Engineering at ÉTS, I have been shipping web products since 2022.

My approach: ship to production, not just demos. The Mad Space runs today with ~15,000 LOC, 30+ API endpoints, multi-currency Stripe payments (4 currencies), 7+ B2B integrations and 4 business workflows that cut order processing by 10–15 minutes.

Before product development, I resolved 2,000+ tickets at Vidéotron with 94% customer satisfaction (NPS 9.6/10) and automated ~50% of tasks via Power Automate. I learned to listen before coding, and to diagnose before proposing.
about.caption: Ralph Christian Gabriel · Repentigny, QC

github.heading: GitHub activity.
github.sub: Consistent commits, real projects, open source contributions.
highlights: Currently building a SaaS coaching platform (Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Supabase) and maintaining a full-stack e-commerce platform with 15,000+ LOC.
Open to collaborating on full-stack web apps, open-source developer tools, and AI-powered products.
Ask me about Next.js, React, TypeScript, REST API design, e-commerce integrations (Stripe, Gelato), or CI/CD pipelines.

about.beyondCodeSub: A few things that shape how I think and work.

marathon.title: Half-Marathon Finisher
marathon.desc: I ran 21.1 km to support Laval firefighters. Months of training taught me what I also find in software development every day: consistency, trusting the process, and finishing what you start.

chess.title: Chess Player
chess.desc: Chess forces me to anticipate, read patterns, and think several moves ahead. That's exactly what I do when designing the architecture of a system.

skiing.title: Skier
skiing.desc: Skiing is my reset. It forces me to read the terrain, react quickly, and fully commit to every turn.

personality.title: INTJ-A, Architect
personality.desc: I'm a strategic thinker. I like approaching problems with a clear plan, going deep rather than wide, and optimizing what can be. In code and in life.

items.desc: Co-founding a coach ↔ athlete sports-coaching mobile app with Alexandre Boisvert. Tech-Lead planning: 169+ structured issues across 13 sprints, competitive audit of 8+ apps, Loi 25 · PIPEDA · GDPR-ready compliance. Stack: Expo/React Native, TypeScript, NativeWind, Supabase. Live Next.js landing page (cadence-web-fawn.vercel.app), source on GitHub.

High-fidelity design and prototyping of web and mobile products, from client brief to implementation: Wise & Wealthy (AI financial coach), Kim Dubois Photographe (portfolio site, first paying client), Vibe Montréal (smart local discovery), DPM Elevate (life-management app — calendar, tasks, habits) and BOA (private-chef & table-service booking site). Design systems, bilingual FR/EN, light/dark, targeting Next.js + TypeScript.

Configuration and integration of TMS solutions via database setup. Google Maps integration (geocoding). Structured Test → Dev → Production deployment with GitLab CI/CD Pipelines. Stack: Spring Boot, Angular.

Designed and shipped a print-on-demand e-commerce marketplace (~15,000 LOC, 30+ API endpoints). 10+ Prisma/PostgreSQL models, custom session-based auth, Google OAuth 2.0, i18n (2 languages), multi-currency (4). 7+ B2B integrations (Stripe, Gelato, Google Merchant Center, GA4, Google Ads). GDPR/Loi 25 compliance. Vercel/Supabase deployment, Deno Edge Functions.
2,000+ tickets handled (AHT 11:18, 94% sat., NPS 9.6/10). Automated ~50% of tasks via Power Automate (HR/IT/Finance). Documented procedures and runbooks to stabilize deployments.

testimonialsPage.subtitle: Discover feedback from people I've had the pleasure of collaborating with on various projects.
testimonialsPage.emptyLabel: No testimonials in this category yet.
testimonialsPage.addCtaSubtitle: A testimonial takes two minutes and helps me tremendously in presenting my projects to future readers.

testimonials.quote: Christian created a professional, modern website perfectly suited to my needs. His professionalism, creativity, and clear communication made the entire process smooth and efficient.
testimonials.author: Founder

testimonials.quote: Ralph took charge of the team during our Testing and Maintenance course projects. He got to know each team member to assign tasks that suited them best, always keeping things fair and balanced. He was always available to answer questions, patient, and ready to help. He's someone who constantly works to improve himself and bring out the best in his teammates. Simply put, he's an excellent leader.
testimonials.author: Jonathan Euclide Marc

testimonials.quote: Ralph stood out through his professionalism and team spirit. He was always there to support me when I was struggling, and what struck me most was his patience. No matter how complex the situation, he took the time to explain, guide, and make sure everything was properly resolved. I recommend him without hesitation.
testimonials.author: Sunny Mélissa Gabriel

testimonials.quote: Ralph Christian Gabriel is an expert in his field! He helped me on numerous occasions with my computer technical issues. He is reliable and always perseveres to find solutions to problems. I greatly appreciated that he always took the time to explain the reasoning behind his plan of action. This demonstrated, in my opinion, his thoroughness but also his dedication to the satisfaction of the people he helps.
testimonials.author: Anne Sofie Laurent

testimonials.quote: When I wanted to bring the idea of Cadence to life, Ralph was the first person I thought of to join me on this adventure. A former classmate, Ralph has always shown exceptional rigor. He quickly demonstrated the same rigor and expertise as a business partner. He approaches every problem with genuine deep thinking — he considers the architecture, anticipates issues, and delivers clean, maintainable work. What particularly impressed me is his ability to learn fast and adapt to the real constraints of a project under construction. He took on complex technical challenges autonomously while remaining a reliable thinking partner. I would recommend Ralph at any time without the slightest hesitation.
testimonials.author: Alexandre Boisvert
